top_signals.title: Active tokenized RWAs surge almost 600% despite crypto pullback: Binance
top_signals.summary: Tokenized stocks, gold and real estate are driving broader adoption as banks and institutions embrace blockchain-based assets despite a weaker crypto market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: SpaceX IPO Forces Investors to Bet on Musk’s Entangled AI Empire
top_signals.summary: The boundaries between Elon Musk’s companies are growing increasingly blurred through shared capital, talent and infrastructure. Investors must decide what that ecosystem is worth.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: FCA seeks High Court injunction against Neil Woodford over new online service
top_signals.summary: UK financial regulator alleges fund manager is providing unauthorised investment advice
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Weight loss drug maker sinks 23% after new safety data spooks investors
top_signals.summary: While the experimental drug met its key targets, analysts are concerned over the commercial opportunity due to side effects.

top_signals.title: The great shift to remote work has entered a new normal
top_signals.summary: The share of U.S. workers doing their jobs primarily at home was 2.3 times higher in 2024 than in 2019.

top_signals.title: New Apple feature automatically changes your compromised passwords
top_signals.summary: At WWDC 26, Apple announced an Apple Intelligence-powered feature that can automatically fix weak and compromised passwords. This works in Safari, and it's rolling out with iOS 27. [...]
